# Full-object override: copied parent/vanilla objects with Director-owned AI weighting.
# Required source-local @variables are copied into this file to preserve parent parse context.
# Trace each object through research/stellar-ai/object-atlas/policy-matrix-2026-07-06.csv.

# Generated surface: common/technology


# Source-local variables required by copied parent objects.
@tier4cost2 = 10000
@tier4weight2 = 40

# policy_route = nomad_contract_specialization; source = common/technology/00_nomads_dlc_tech.txt; parent_ai = parent_ai_partial; source_ai_weight = yes
tech_arkship_planetary_refinery = {
	area = engineering
	category = { industry }
	tier = 4
	cost = @tier4cost2
	weight = @tier4weight2
	is_rare = yes

	prerequisites = {
		"tech_arkship_tier_3"
		"tech_planetary_engineering"
	}

	potential = {
		is_nomadic = yes
	}

	weight_modifier = {
		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			OR = {
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_curator }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_spark_of_genius }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_spark_of_genius_2 }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal_2 }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal_3 }
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			has_technology = tech_space_mining_3
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			has_technology = tech_space_mining_4
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			has_technology = tech_space_mining_5
		}
		inline_script = {
			script = technologies/rare_technologies_weight_modifiers
			TECHNOLOGY = tech_arkship_planetary_refinery
		}
	}

	ai_weight = {

		modifier = { factor = 1.5 is_nomadic = yes has_country_flag = starting_civilian_arkship }
	}
}


# policy_route = nomad_contract_specialization; source = common/technology/00_nomads_dlc_tech.txt; parent_ai = parent_ai_partial; source_ai_weight = yes
tech_arkship_system_scanner = {
	area = physics
	category = { computing }
	tier = 4
	cost = @tier4cost2
	weight = @tier4weight2
	is_rare = yes

	prerequisites = {
		"tech_arkship_tier_3"
		"tech_sensors_2"
		"tech_automated_exploration"
	}

	potential = {
		is_nomadic = yes
	}

	prereqfor_desc = {
		custom = {
			title = "TECH_UNLOCK_DEEP_SCAN_CONTRACT_TITLE"
			desc = "TECH_UNLOCK_DEEP_SCAN_CONTRACT_DESC"
		}
	}

	weight_modifier = {
		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			OR = {
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_curator }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_spark_of_genius }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_spark_of_genius_2 }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal_2 }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal_3 }
			}
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			has_technology = tech_sensors_3
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			has_technology = tech_sensors_4
		}
		modifier = {
			factor = 5
			has_technology = tech_curator_lab
		}
		inline_script = {
			script = technologies/rare_technologies_weight_modifiers
			TECHNOLOGY = tech_arkship_system_scanner
		}
	}

	ai_weight = {

		modifier = { factor = 1.5 is_nomadic = yes has_country_flag = starting_science_arkship }
	}
}

tech_arkship_stellar_igniter = {
	area = physics
	category = { field_manipulation }
	tier = 4
	cost = @tier4cost2
	weight = @tier4weight2
	is_rare = yes

	prerequisites = {
		"tech_arkship_tier_3"
		"tech_mine_dark_matter"
	}

	potential = {
		is_nomadic = yes
	}

	prereqfor_desc = {
		custom = {
			title = "TECH_UNLOCK_STELLAR_IGNITION_CONTRACT_TITLE"
			desc = "TECH_UNLOCK_STELLAR_IGNITION_CONTRACT_DESC"
		}
	}

	weight_modifier = {
		modifier = {
			factor = 2
			OR = {
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_curator }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_spark_of_genius }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_spark_of_genius_2 }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal_2 }
				has_trait_in_council = { TRAIT = leader_trait_maniacal_3 }
			}
		}
		inline_script = {
			script = technologies/rare_technologies_weight_modifiers
			TECHNOLOGY = tech_arkship_stellar_igniter
		}
	}

	ai_weight = {

		modifier = { factor = 1.5 is_nomadic = yes has_country_flag = starting_military_arkship }
	}
}
